title: 5 ancient grains and their nutritional benefits
description: African cuisine is a treasure trove of flavors and traditions, many of which are rooted in ancient grains.

title: Scientists Discover Ancient Microbes That Could Explain the Origin of Life
description: The science isn’t the first thing that jumps out. It’s the environment. A remotely operated vehicle plunging into dark sediment, a research vessel drifting off the coast of Uruguay, its deck cluttered with cables and screens. It has an almost cinematic quality, but what scientists extracted from that mud might subtly change our perception of [...]

title: Man’s Best Friend: Why this 15,000-year-old dog fossil from England got scientists "puzzled"?
description: A 15,000-year-old jawbone from England reveals dogs lived with humans far earlier than believed, reshaping the history of domestication. It indicates that the early dogs probably assisted humans in hunting and securing camps in Ice Age era.

title: Northland Securities Estimates Fossil Group Q2 Earnings
description: Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL – Free Report) – Northland Securities decreased their Q2 2027 earnings estimates for Fossil Group in a research note issued to investors on Monday, March 23rd. Northland Securities analyst O. Rickert now anticipates that the accessories brand company will earn $0.07 per share for the quarter, down from their previous forecast [...]
